Name: Kobold Minion
Special Abilities: Nooooo! When an ally within 2 spaces dies, attack once for free.

Name: Kobold
Special Abilities: Nooooo! When an ally within 2 spaces dies, attack once for free.

Name: Kobold Sneak
Special Abilities: Revenge! When an ally dies, move up to 6 spaces before Nooooo! ability.

Name: Goblin Minion
Special Abilities: Haha, Missed Me! Whenever an attack misses you, deal 1 psychic damage in return.

Name: Goblin
Special Abilities: Haha, Missed Me! Whenever an attack misses you, deal 1 psychic damage in return.

Name: Bugbear
Special Abilities: Haha, Missed Me! Whenever an attack misses you, deal 1 psychic damage in return.

Name: Goblin Ratrider
Attack Description: Bite & Stab (2x). 1d6+2. On Move: Overrun. Rat dashes through enemies dealing 1d4.
Special Abilities: Haha, Missed Me! Mount rules apply.

Name: Skeleton Minion
Special Abilities: Reassemble. On death, 50% chance to return with 1 HP at start of next round.

Name: Skeleton
Special Abilities: Reassemble. On death, 50% chance to return with 1 HP at start of next round.

Name: Zombie
Special Abilities: Undying. First time reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead.

Name: Ghoul
Attack Description: Claws (2x). 1d6+4. On hit: DC 11 or Paralyzed (save ends).
Special Abilities: Paralytic Touch. Melee attacks force DC 11 save or Paralyzed.

Name: Bandit
Special Abilities: Pack Tactics. Advantage on attacks if an ally is within 2 spaces of target.

Name: Bandit Captain
Attack Description: Longsword (2x). 1d8+4. OR Rally. One ally attacks for free.
Special Abilities: Commanding Presence. Once per round, give one ally a free attack.

Name: Wolf
Attack Description: Bite. 1d8+3. On hit: DC 10 or knocked Prone.
Special Abilities: Pack Tactics. Advantage on attacks if an ally is within 2 spaces of target.

Name: Dire Wolf
Attack Description: Bite. 2d6+4. On hit: DC 11 or knocked Prone.

Name: Giant Eagle
Attack Description: Talons. 1d12+5 (ignores metal armor). On Death: Deal 1d12 damage back.
Special Abilities: Flyby. No opportunity attacks when flying away.

Name: Cultist
Attack Description: Oblation of Blood! OR Dreadful Blade. 1d6+6. OR Blood Boil. (Range 12, Bloodied creature) 3d6+6.
Special Abilities: Fanatical Zeal. While not at max HP, make all rolls with advantage. Crits also inflict Despair.

Name: Spiny Fiend
Special Abilities: Spines. Melee attackers take 3 damage. Fanatical Zeal.
